name: Cost-controlled Qwen3.6-27B TaskOps pilot
purpose: Run a small but representative first experiment before expanding to full benchmark suites.
selection_rules: Pre-register task IDs before running the benchmark.
Prefer public tasks with reproducible local or containerized evaluation.
Avoid live-web, paid-API, licensed-software, and GPU-heavy tasks in the first pilot unless they are the point of the task type.
Use the same worker model, context, sampling defaults, and tool budget across direct-agent and TaskOps-agent arms whenever possible.
Do not tune TaskOps prompts or decomposition rules against hidden test outcomes.

pilot_slices.difficulty_policy: mix easy/medium; use as low-lift control
pilot_slices.primary_readout: TaskOps should not create large score changes on simple patch tasks.

pilot_slices.difficulty_policy: prefer public tasks that fit local Docker or affordable remote execution
pilot_slices.primary_readout: Does TaskOps improve hard codebase repair without increasing false completion?

pilot_slices.difficulty_policy: sample terminal tasks across build/debug/security/system administration
pilot_slices.primary_readout: Does TaskOps improve multi-step terminal work and failure recovery?

pilot_slices.difficulty_policy: use self-contained tasks that do not require paid external APIs
pilot_slices.primary_readout: Does TaskOps help skill/procedure-following and evidence closure?

pilot_slices.difficulty_policy: sample small/medium repository-generation tasks with deterministic tests
pilot_slices.primary_readout: Does TaskOps improve decomposition and installable multi-file artifact completion?

pilot_slices.difficulty_policy: choose public tasks spanning short, medium, and long calibrated horizons
pilot_slices.primary_readout: Does TaskOps improve time-horizon honesty and restartability?

pilot_slices.difficulty_policy: sample from recommended_core first, then add 2-3 visual_free_extension tasks for image-understanding coverage
pilot_slices.primary_readout: Does TaskOps improve ALE-style broad real-work tasks without licensed-tool or GPU-license confounds?

pilot_slices.difficulty_policy: choose the most affordable 8-hour-class environments first
pilot_slices.primary_readout: Does TaskOps create measurable gains on long AI R&D work or mainly reduce silent failure?

minimum_publishable_pilot.note: Use this if budget blocks the full pilot.
